name: Taste Engine
description: Cross-domain aesthetic intelligence that learns your visual taste

name: Copy Compiler
description: Ladders any product down to the desire it sells, then remixes winning lines on a mix board

name: Thrive OS
description: A single-tool operating system for thriving indefinitely — across business and personal life

name: Lattice
description: A LogFrame OS that turns any project into a living causal system and shows where the chain breaks

name: Cue
description: A motion-graphics storyboard tool for landing-page demos — pose beats, the AI tweens the motion

name: Folio
description: A reading-first surface where the article is operable — lens, grounded ask, persistent library

name: SkillForge
description: An AI-native skill compiler — compile, validate against a 13-axis rubric, red-team, and export

name: The Compiler
description: Two story/persuasion engines that strip an idea to its invariants and render it into any medium

name: Orb Engine
description: A non-blocking onboarding copilot that tracks what you've learned and docks teaching onto the real UI
